headline: Most likely slowdown drivers: an event-driven Lambda consumer is broken; an ECS service cannot start healthy tasks; an ECS service cannot start healthy tasks.

top_incidents.title: ECS service has desired tasks but no healthy running capacity (2 related findings)
top_incidents.probable_cause: test_def-service-vnwns50w cannot start healthy tasks, so the service path is unavailable or degraded.
top_incidents.recommended_action: Fix image pull, task definition, IAM, networking, or dependency startup issues before scaling traffic back to the service.
top_incidents.business_impact: Multiple ECS services in the same deployment path are unavailable, so client-facing features or internal jobs on that path may be down.

top_incidents.title: Lambda event source is failing to process records
top_incidents.probable_cause: task-dispatcher cannot successfully consume from its event source.
top_incidents.recommended_action: Fix the execution role or permissions, then re-enable healthy processing and drain backlog.
top_incidents.business_impact: Events from arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:027087672282:table/agent_errors/stream/2026-02-23T07:46:15.921 are likely not being processed by task-dispatcher, so async workflows can stall or fall behind.

top_incidents.title: ECS service has no recent utilization datapoints in the snapshot (2 related findings)
top_incidents.probable_cause: Without CPU or memory history, rightsizing and bottleneck analysis are blind.
top_incidents.recommended_action: Collect CloudWatch CPU and memory utilization history for this service to confirm whether it is starved or overprovisioned.
top_incidents.business_impact: The service can still be running, but there is not enough telemetry to tell whether it is under-sized, over-sized, or intermittently saturated.

top_incidents.title: A disabled event source mapping may leave async work unprocessed
top_incidents.probable_cause: Messages or stream records may not be flowing into the consumer path.
top_incidents.recommended_action: Confirm whether this path is intentionally paused. If not, restore the mapping after validating the consumer.
top_incidents.business_impact: Work from agent-fix-tasks.fifo is currently paused before it reaches remediator, which can delay async jobs or retries.

top_incidents.title: A disabled event source mapping may leave async work unprocessed
top_incidents.probable_cause: Messages or stream records may not be flowing into the consumer path.
top_incidents.recommended_action: Confirm whether this path is intentionally paused. If not, restore the mapping after validating the consumer.
top_incidents.business_impact: Work from arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:027087672282:table/agent_errors/stream/2026-02-23T07:46:15.921 is currently paused before it reaches task-dispatcher, which can delay async jobs or retries.
